FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Enum TextEditCommand

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

Editor commands in DOCUMENT terms. Apply(TextEditCommand, bool) handles every document-order command; the vertical/visual ones (Up/Down/Page*) and the seam-touching ones (Copy/Cut/Paste need the clipboard PAL, Commit/Cancel are control semantics) intentionally fall through to the control layer.

public enum TextEditCommand : byte

Fields

Backspace = 2
Cancel = 25
Commit = 24
Copy = 19
Cut = 20
Delete = 3
DocEnd = 15
DocHome = 14
Down = 11
End = 13
Home = 12
InsertNewline = 1
Left = 6
None = 0
PageDown = 17
PageUp = 16
Paste = 21
Redo = 23
Right = 7
SelectAll = 18
Undo = 22
Up = 10
WordBackspace = 4
WordDelete = 5
WordLeft = 8
WordRight = 9
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
